# PulseSoc — Powered by CoinPilotXAI

CoinPlotXAI Inc. operates PulseSoc, an educational AI intelligence platform for crypto market context, scam awareness, wallet safety, portfolio scenarios, Sports Edge, and Pro Arena simulation training.

Primary site: https://pulsesoc.com/
Support: https://pulsesoc.com/support
Privacy: https://pulsesoc.com/privacy
Terms: https://pulsesoc.com/terms
Optional Telegram companion: https://t.me/DocShieldX_bot
Machine-readable public index: https://pulsesoc.com/ai-index.json
Canonical sitemap: https://pulsesoc.com/sitemap.xml

## Important Safety Context

CoinPlotXAI Inc. provides educational AI intelligence only and does not provide financial, betting, investment, or legal advice.

PulseSoc never holds user funds and never asks for seed phrases, private keys, recovery phrases, wallet passwords, or signing credentials.

Sports Edge is informational only and does not provide guaranteed betting outcomes.

- Live crypto market board: https://pulsesoc.com/live-crypto-market

## Indexable Content Collections

- Market pages: https://pulsesoc.com/markets/btc, /markets/eth, /markets/sol, and additional major assets.
- Prediction scenario pages: /markets/btc/prediction, /markets/eth/prediction, and equivalent major asset scenario pages.
- Live market pages: /markets/btc/live, /markets/eth/live, and equivalent major asset live context pages.
- Sports Edge pages: /sports-edge/nba, /sports-edge/nfl, /sports-edge/mlb, /sports-edge/nhl, /sports-edge/soccer, /sports-edge/tennis, /sports-edge/live-games.
- Country intelligence pages: /country-intelligence/us, /country-intelligence/uk, /country-intelligence/canada, and supported country profiles.
- Structured articles: /intel/crypto-scam-alert-checklist, /intel/wallet-drainer-warning-signs, /intel/bitcoin-risk-scenarios, /intel/ai-crypto-analysis-framework, /intel/sports-edge-position-discipline, /intel/telegram-crypto-bot-safety-guide.

## Keyword Clusters

- AI crypto intelligence, crypto AI assistant, AI market analysis, crypto training simulator.
- Crypto battle simulator, simulated crypto trading simulator, crypto risk management, trading psychology training.
- Crypto scam protection, crypto scam checker, wallet drainer warning, crypto safety tools.
- Crypto wallet scanner, blockchain wallet intelligence, wallet risk scanner, public TXID checker.
- Sports betting intelligence, AI sports intelligence, Sports Edge AI, position risk analysis.
- Bitcoin prediction, BTC price prediction, live crypto market, trending crypto.

## AI Search Summary

PulseSoc helps users understand market signals, wallet risks, scams, whale movement, portfolio decisions, Pro Arena virtual-dollar simulations, and Sports Edge context across web, mobile, and optional Telegram alerts. The product emphasizes clarity, safety, public data, user control, privacy-safe Arena identities, and ethical conversion. It avoids gambling mechanics, fake urgency, fake testimonials, guaranteed profit claims, guaranteed sports picks, and private wallet credential collection.

## Crawler Guidance

Public educational pages are indexable. Private account, admin, API, debug, payment webhook, and authentication routes should not be indexed. CoinPlotXAI Inc. does not publish fake testimonials, fake user metrics, black-hat SEO pages, or guaranteed-outcome claims.
